arts.ttl: ‘No room for error’ - Araujo sends Barca title warning
arts.sum: Barcelona defender Ronald Araujo has warned his team there’s “no room for error” in the title race after cutting the gap to Real Madrid. Barca have already lost five times this season in the Spanish top flight, and Araujo knows his team can’t afford any more slip-ups.

arts.ttl: Futuristic Nike Barcelona & Chelsea 25-26 Concept Kits Using Unreleased Nike Total 90 Template
arts.sum: In the summer of 2025, Nike will release a spectacular T90 football kit template.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi’s Barcelona locker is up for sale, and it’s not cheap
arts.sum: The locker used by Messi is available to bid on at auction and has already reached an eye-watering figure. At time of writing, the top bid for Lionel Messi’s Barcelona locker sits at $300,000, however there’s an additional 22% in bidder’s fee for the lucky winner to face.

arts.ttl: Barcelona eyeing summer deal for Crystal Palace star
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona are giving consideration to a summer swoop for a member of the defensive ranks at Crystal Palace. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, citing Antena 2, who…

arts.ttl: Valencia lineup vs. Barcelona: Predicted XI for Copa del Rey clash with Giorgi Mamardashvili set to drop out
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Valencia could line up for Thursday's Copa del Rey quarter-final against Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Barcelona lineup vs. Valencia: Predicted XI for Copa del Rey clash with Blaugrana set to make Gavi decision
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Barcelona could line up for Thursday's Copa del Rey quarter-final against Valencia.

arts.ttl: Preview: Valencia vs. Barcelona - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Copa del Rey clash between Valencia and Barcelona, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
